title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Data Entry Operator Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. Allotted various vacancies for Data Entry Operator Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for any degree can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
